items.name: Ecliptian Wings
items.description:
Ecliptian Wings!

Unleash the balance of light and shadow with these majestic black-and-white wings. Perfect for those who soar between day and night, embracing the harmony of contrasts. Wear them to make a bold statement wherever your adventures take you!
